remarks: Located on prestigious Oenoke Ridge in the heart of New Canaan, this spectacular modern farmhouse represents the pinnacle of luxury living, offering exceptional craftsmanship, designer finishes, and every high-end amenity imaginable. Perfectly positioned just moments from the New Canaan Nature Center, scenic walking trails, and a short stroll via sidewalks to the Village's renowned restaurants, boutiques, and theater, the location is truly unparalleled. Meticulously maintained and beautifully appointed, the home is defined by airy, light-filled interiors and an exceptional open-concept floor plan designed for both sophisticated entertaining and comfortable everyday living. A gracious wraparound porch welcomes you into elegant interiors featuring a stunning foyer, expansive living room with gas fireplace, and a state-of-the-art chef's kitchen with oversized center island, premium appliances, butler's pantry, and custom bar area. The adjoining family room, anchored by a second fireplace, opens through French doors to the resort-style grounds beyond. Designed for seamless indoor-outdoor living, the private backyard is a true sanctuary, featuring a spectacular Gunite pool and spa surrounded by lush professional landscaping. A spacious stone terrace offers multiple seating and lounging areas, while the fully equipped outdoor kitchen creates the ideal setting for alfresco dining and entertaining. The luxurious primary suite is a serene retreat with vaulted ceilings, a spa-inspired
